zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Quincy於1250年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯時，她的父親Sir Robert De Quincy11247歲，母親Elen ferch Llywelyn43歲。她於1267年2月5日與Baldwin Le Wak or Wake在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年3月27日在英國林可爾史爾包恩享年35歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Quincy于1250年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Robert De Quincy11247岁，母亲Elen ferch Llywelyn43岁。她于1267年2月5日与Baldwin Le Wak or Wake在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年3月27日在英国林可爾史爾包恩享年35岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Quincy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in France deriving their names from the Gallo-Roman personal name Quintus, meaning ‘fifth(-born)’ + the locative suffix -acum. The earliest bearer of the name in England, that of Saer de Quincy, ancestor of the earls of Winchester, was from Cuinchy in Pas-de-Calais, but the name may have been reinforced by immigrants from Quincy-sous-Sénard in Seine-et-Oise or Quincy-Voisins in Seine-et-Marne. A family of the name de Quincy held the title Earl of Winchester 1207–65. Descendants of this family later bore the name Quincey up to the time of the English essayist Thomas De Quincey (1785–1859), who changed his name from Quincey to De Quincey in 1796.

History: The American Quincy family were established in MA by Edmund Quincy in 1633. Fifth in descent was Josiah Quincy (1744–75), a leading patriot, who was sent to England to argue the colonists’ case in 1774. His son Josiah (1772–1864) was a powerful opponent of slavery, president of Harvard, and mayor of Boston, a post also held by several of his descendants. The traditional pronunciation is “Quinzy”.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Quincy was born in 1250, in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Robert De Quincy, was 11247 and her mother, Elen ferch Llywelyn, was 43. She married Baldwin Le Wak or Wake on 5 February 1267, in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 March 1285, in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Quincy est née en 1250, à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert De Quincy, avait 11247 ans et sa mère, Elen ferch Llywelyn, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Baldwin Le Wak or Wake le 5 février 1267, à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1285, à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Quincy 1250 in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert De Quincy 11247 und ihre Mutter Elen ferch Llywelyn 43. Sie hat am 5. Februar 1267 in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England Baldwin Le Wak or Wake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1285 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Quincy è nata il nel 1250 nel Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert De Quincy, aveva 11247 anni e sua madre, Elen ferch Llywelyn, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Baldwin Le Wak or Wake il 5 febbraio 1267, nel Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1285, nel Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Quincyが1250年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Quincyは11247歳，母Elen ferch Llywelynは43歳であった。1267年2月5日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリスウオルスでBaldwin Le Wak or Wakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年3月27日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンで35歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Quincy(이)가 1250년 영국 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert De Quincy(은)는 11247세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elen ferch Llywelyn(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1267년 2월 5일 영국 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에서 Baldwin Le Wak or Wake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 3월 27일 영국 링코실르 본에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England: Blisworth, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Quincy nasceu em 1250, em Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert De Quincy, tinha 11247 anos e sua mãe, Elen ferch Llywelyn, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Baldwin Le Wak or Wake em 5 de fevereiro de 1267, em Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1285, em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Quincy родилась в 1250 г. в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert De Quincy было 11247 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen ferch Llywelyn, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baldwin Le Wak or Wake 5 февраля 1267 г. в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 марта 1285 г. в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Quincy nació en 1250, en Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert De Quincy, tenía 11247 años y su mamá, Elen ferch Llywelyn, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Baldwin Le Wak or Wake el 5 de febrero de 1267, en Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1285, en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
